question: Show the client name who has the most total amount of books ordered.
sql: SELECT Client.Name FROM Client JOIN Orders ON Client.IdClient = Orders.IdClient JOIN Books_Order ON Orders.IdOrder = Books_Order.IdOrder JOIN Book ON Books_Order.ISBN = Book.ISBN GROUP BY Client.IdClient ORDER BY SUM(Books_Order.amount * Book.SalePrice) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找总订单金额最高的客户

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求找出总订单金额最高的客户名称，SQL反向翻译描述通过连接Books_Order和Book表计算总金额（SUM(Books_Order.amount * Book.SalePrice)），按Client.IdClient分组并降序排序后取第一条记录，准确实现了该需求。
